prompt: Write a dry one-paragraph Amazon review of the experience of waking up.
response: **"The experience of waking up is a deeply overrated and monotonous daily chore. The abrupt transition from blissful unconsciousness to groggy reality is jarring, made worse by the relentless screech of an alarm or the unwelcome intrusion of sunlight. Stiff limbs, gritty eyes, and the sinking realization that the day demands productivity make it a universally unpleasant ritual. The only redeeming quality is that it’s temporary—until, of course, it happens again tomorrow. One star; would not recommend."**
